creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Mar 05, 2008 at 12:42:59AM +0100, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> Ok here's an idea - what if we stop inheriting CFLAGS from /usr/share/mk
> and define our own in bsd.port.mk?

I think that's a fine idea.  Would still want to consume
src/share/mk/bsd.cpu.mk.

-- 
-- David  (obrien@FreeBSD.org)
